recordApproval() - Method in class com.fincredit.model.LoanOfficer
 
recordRejection() - Method in class com.fincredit.model.LoanOfficer
 
refresh() - Method in class com.fincredit.gui.ClientsPanel
Refreshes the clients table by re-fetching data from the registry and updating the display.
refresh() - Method in class com.fincredit.gui.LoansPanel
Refreshes the table with the latest loan data from the registry
registerClient(String, String, String, double, double) - Method in class com.fincredit.registry.LoanRegistry
Registers a new client with the provided information, generates a unique ID for the client, and saves the updated list of clients to disk.
reject(EvaluationResult) - Method in class com.fincredit.model.Loan
Method to reject a loan application, updating the status to REJECTED and storing the evaluation result for reference.
REJECTED - Enum constant in enum class com.fincredit.model.Loan.Status
 
requestLoan(String, String, double, int, Double) - Method in class com.fincredit.registry.LoanRegistry
Processes a loan request for a given client and product type, calculating the monthly payment and evaluating the client's creditworthiness using the provided evaluator.
